mapper.sql: id, plan_date, symbol, name, plan_status, buy_condition, sell_condition, stop_loss_price, take_profit_price, planned_position_ratio, max_loss_amount, allowed_to_trade, risk_note, notes, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_plan WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND plan_date = #{planDate}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_plan WHERE plan_date = #{planDate} AND allowed_to_trade = true
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_plan WHERE plan_date = #{planDate}
